member.name: T:HarfBuzzSharp.Blob
member.summary: Represents a blob of data in memory.

member.name: C:HarfBuzzSharp.Blob(System.IntPtr,System.Int32,HarfBuzzSharp.MemoryMode)
member.param: The data to wrap.
The length of the data being wrapped.
The memory mode to use.
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class, wrapping the specified data.
member.remarks: If there was a problem creating the blob, or if the data length was zero, then an empty blob will be created.

member.name: C:HarfBuzzSharp.Blob(System.IntPtr,System.Int32,HarfBuzzSharp.MemoryMode,HarfBuzzSharp.ReleaseDelegate)
member.param: The data to wrap.
The length of the data being wrapped.
The memory mode to use.
The delegate to invoke when the data is not needed anymore.
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class, wrapping the specified data.
member.remarks: If there was a problem creating the blob, or if the data length was zero, then an empty blob will be created.

member.name: C:HarfBuzzSharp.Blob(System.IntPtr,System.UInt32,HarfBuzzSharp.MemoryMode,System.Object,HarfBuzzSharp.BlobReleaseDelegate)
member.param: The data to wrap.
The length of the data being wrapped.
The memory mode to use.
The user data to pass to the release delegate.
The delegate to invoke when the data is not needed anymore.
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class, wrapping the specified data.
member.remarks: If there was a problem creating the blob, or if the data length was zero, then an empty blob will be created.

member.name: M:HarfBuzzSharp.Blob.AsSpan
member.summary: Returns a span that wraps the data.
member.returns: Returns the span that wraps the data.
member.remarks: If the data is released, then the span becomes invalid.

member.name: M:HarfBuzzSharp.Blob.AsStream
member.summary: Returns a stream that wraps the data.
member.returns: Returns the stream that wraps the data.
member.remarks: If the data is released, then the stream becomes invalid.

member.name: M:HarfBuzzSharp.Blob.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.param: to release both managed and unmanaged resources; to release only unmanaged resources.
member.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the and optionally releases the managed resources.
member.remarks: Always dispose the object before you release your last reference to the . Otherwise, the resources it is using will not be freed until the garbage collector calls the finalizer.

member.name: M:HarfBuzzSharp.Blob.DisposeHandler
member.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used.

member.name: P:HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.Language
member.summary: Gets or sets the language of the text in the buffer.

member.remarks: Language is used by some OpenType features to customize shaping behavior.

member.name: P:HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.Length
member.summary: Gets or sets the size of the buffer.
member.remarks: If the new length is greater that the current length, more memory will be allocated. If the new length is less than the current length, the extra items will be cleared.

member.name: M:HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.NormalizeGlyphs
member.summary: Reorders glyphs so that they can be run through subsequent phases consistently.
member.remarks: This ensures that clusters of glyphs are arranged in a canonical order after shaping.

member.name: P:HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.ReplacementCodepoint
member.summary: Gets or sets the code point used to replace invalid characters during text processing.
member.value: The replacement code point. The default is (U+FFFD).

member.name: M:HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.Reset
member.summary: Resets the buffer to its initial state as if it were newly created.
member.remarks: This clears contents and resets all properties to their default values.

member.name: M:HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.Reverse
member.summary: Reverses the order of buffer contents.

member.name: M:HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.ReverseClusters
member.summary: Reverses the order of clusters in the buffer.
member.remarks: Within each cluster, glyphs maintain their original order.

member.name: T:HarfBuzzSharp.Internals.PlatformConfiguration
member.summary: Provides properties to detect the current platform and architecture for native library loading.

member.name: P:HarfBuzzSharp.Internals.PlatformConfiguration.Is64Bit
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the current process is running as 64-bit.

member.name: P:HarfBuzzSharp.Internals.PlatformConfiguration.IsArm
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the current process is running on an ARM architecture.
member.value: if the architecture is ARM or ARM64; otherwise, .

member.name: P:HarfBuzzSharp.Internals.PlatformConfiguration.IsGlibc
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the current Linux system uses glibc.
member.value: if running on a glibc-based Linux system; otherwise, .

member.name: P:HarfBuzzSharp.Internals.PlatformConfiguration.IsLinux
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the current operating system is Linux.
member.value: if the operating system is Linux; otherwise, .

member.name: P:HarfBuzzSharp.Internals.PlatformConfiguration.IsMac
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the current operating system is macOS.
member.value: if the operating system is macOS; otherwise, .

member.name: P:HarfBuzzSharp.Internals.PlatformConfiguration.IsUnix
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the current operating system is Unix-based.
member.value: if the operating system is Unix-based (Linux, macOS, or other Unix variants); otherwise, .

member.name: P:HarfBuzzSharp.Internals.PlatformConfiguration.IsWindows
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the current operating system is Windows.
member.value: if the operating system is Windows; otherwise, .

member.name: P:HarfBuzzSharp.Internals.PlatformConfiguration.LinuxFlavor
member.summary: Gets or sets the Linux distribution flavor identifier used for native library resolution.
member.value: The Linux flavor identifier, such as "glibc" or "musl".
